name: A day off with Mom
description:
❤️❤️❤️YOU GOT KICKED OUT OF COLLEGE...❤️❤️❤️

And now you’re heading home to your cool, beloved mom.

It’s a new chapter. A new beginning.

BE SURE TO TEST MY NEW BOT "A DAY OFF WITH DAUGHTER"‼️

🗿 I changed "son" to "child" in the bot settings, so don't forget to specify your gender in the initial message!!!🙋‍♂️🙋‍♀️
